query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN budgetAmount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN budgetAmount = '0' OR budgetAmount = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN budgetAmount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value_count,
  SUM(CAST(budgetAmount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_budget
FROM budget_lines WHERE projectId = '712-driggs';

  SUM(CASE WHEN budgetAmount = '0' OR budgetAmount = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN budgetAmount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value_count,
  SUM(CAST(budgetAmount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_budget
